violations.text: The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and toilet rooms were lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2025
The doors to the toilet rooms are not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2025
